title: Intercept
description: You are covering another player. All attacks that would be directed towards them are redirected towards you.
smart_description: You are covering [gold]{Covering}[/gold]. All attacks that would be directed towards them are redirected towards you.
notes: Damage taken is multiplied by (number of covered creatures + 1). The power automatically removes itself at the end of the enemy's turn. The {Covering} variable dynamically displays the names of all covered players.
